      "text": "tlikkuschaî Weetai pretti / un

2. Ta Preekfch-Galla Gar-
iuns bija fiints Ohlekchu lihds
ahin Durwim prett Seemeka-
Puffi/ un tas Plattums bija
veezdefinitis Ohlekschu.
3. Prett tahm diwidefmits
Ohlektim / kas tam eekchejam
Pagalmam bija / un prett to
Grihdi/ kas tam ahrejam Pa-
galmam bija/ stahweja Marga
prett Margu trejas Rindês.
4. Un no Eekchpuffes preeftch
teem Kambareem / bija weena
statgajama Weeta definitis Oh-
lektis platta/ un weens Betfch no
weenas Ohlektis/ un winna Dur-
wis bija prett Seemeka-Puffi.
5. Un tee augstaki Kambari
bija fchauraki neka tee/ kas letja
bija/un pee ta Ustaifijuma to
Margu pehz/ kas to appakfcheju
un widdeju Ruhmi afsplehte.
6. Jo jepfchu tee trejas Rin-
dês stahweja/ tad tomehr fcheem
ne bija nekahdi Pihlari / ka to
Pagalmju Pihlari/ tapehz bija
tee fchauraki neka tee/ kas letja
bija/ un ka tee widdeji no Sein-
mes us augfchu.
7. Un tas Muhris kas us
Ahrapuffi teem Kambareem pret-
ti bija / lihds tam ahrejam Pa-
galmam us to Kambaxu Preek-
fchu/ ta pascha Garrums bija
peezdefinitis Ohlekschu.
8. Jo to Kambaxu Garrums/
kas ahreja Pagalina bija / tas"

      "text": "bija peezdefmits Ohlekschu/ un

9. Un appakfch tcheein Kam-
bareem bija weena Weeta no
Rihta Puffes/ zaur fo bij ja-ce-
eet no ta ahreja Pagalmja.
10. Pee ta Plattuma ta Pa-
galmja Muhra prett Rihta-Puf-
fi preekfch tahs atliffuchsas Wee-
tas/ un us ta Ustaifijuma Preek-
fchu bija Kambari.
11. Un tas Widduzis us win-
no Preekfchu/ bija tapatt ka tee
Kambari/ kas prett Seemeka-
Puffi bija/ tik labbi pehz winno
Garruma ka pehz winnu Plat-
tuma; Un wiffas winna iseijam-
us Weetas bija pehz winno
Lihdsibas/ un tapatt ka tahs zit-
tas Durwis.
12. Un tapatt bija tahs Dur-
wis to Kambaxu prett Seeme-
ka-Puffi / un Durwis bija tat
Preekfchpuffei/ itt klaht pee to
stahwu Muhri/ kad no Rihta-
Puffes naht.
13. Tad fazzija winch us
man: Tee Kambari no Seeme-
ka-Puffes/ un tee Kambari no
Deenas-Widdus Puffes/ kas us
tahs atliffuchsas Weetas Preek-
fchu irr/ tee irr fwehti Kambari/
eekfch kurreeem teem Preestereem/
kas pee ta KUNGA klaht eet /
buhs tahs wiﬀuswehtakas Lee-
tas ehft. Tur buhs teem tahs
wiffuswehtakas Leetas nolift/ un
to Ehdamo-Uppuri/ un to Greh-
fo."
